name: Sugar Rush
short_description: Enter the sweet world of Sugar Rush, an action packed top-down roguelike filled with sweets and treats to empower your journey. Test your skills by facing various fruit snacks, defeating them with color instead of damage. Find the best set of treats to survive as long as possible!
detailed_description:
Enter the sweet world of Sugar Rush, an action packed top-down roguelike filled with sweets and treats to empower your journey. Test your skills by facing various fruit snacks, defeating them with color instead of damage. Find the best set of treats to survive as long as possible!

Fight, Buy, Survive
Fight the endless hordes of fruits and fruit snacks! Discover and power up from 40 Sugars that give you unique buffs and effects. Explore endless combinations of Treats every game!

Discover New Ways to Play
Unlock over 50+ Drinks, each with their own unique effects. Find Vanity Drinks to use cool game modifiers that completely change the game!

Unlimited Mastery
Enemies in this game are defeated by color, not damage! Easy to learn, hard to master!
